steps.title: Identify the conclusion that guides the answer
steps.content: The scientists conclude that Little Foot adapted to tree life based on the evidence of the fossilized bones compared to modern tree-climbing apes. The blank must express a relationship that logically supports this conclusion.

steps.title: Apply the reasoning to find the match
steps.content: ”Comparable to” (similar to) explains why the scientists concluded Little Foot adapted to trees—the fossilized bones showed the same climbing-related structures as modern tree-dwelling apes. The other three choices express inferiority, complete separation, or an impossible origin relationship. That matches choice B — B is correct.
